<button class="closeButton" id="secureLoginPopUp" type="button" title="Close" onclick="closePopups();" tabindex="1"> </button>

<input type="text" name="AuthenticationFG.USER_PRINCIPAL" size="28" "="" class="type_UserPrincipal ui-autocomplete-input" data-febatype="UserPrincipal" maxlength="65" id="AuthenticationFG.USER_PRINCIPAL" value="" onkeypress="return isUSerId(event,this.id);" ondragstart="return false" ondrop="return false" autocomplete="off">

<input type="Submit" name="Action.VALIDATE_EV_AUTH_CREDENTIALS" class="waves-button-input" id="VALIDATE_EV_AUTH_CREDENTIALS" value="Login" onclick="appendToLoginURL(),isArcotIdPresent(),collectingSystemInfo()" ondragstart="return false" ondrop="return false">

<input type="text" name="AuthenticationFG.MOBILENUMBER" title="Mobile Number" "="" class="type_FEBAUnboundString" data-febatype="FEBAUnboundString" maxlength="20" id="AuthenticationFG.MOBILENUMBER" value="" onkeypress="return onlyNumAccNo1(event);" ondragstart="return false" ondrop="return false">
<input type="Submit" name="Action.2FA_CONTINUE_ONE" class="waves-button-input" id="2FA_CONTINUE_ONE" value="Continue" title="Continue" ondragstart="return false" ondrop="return false">

<input autocomplete="new-password" type="password" name="AuthenticationFG.SMS_OTP" class="loginPanelTextboxMediumStyle virtual-keyboard ui-keyboard-input ui-widget-content ui-corner-all ui-keyboard-input-current" id="AuthenticationFG.SMS_OTP" title="OTP" onkeypress="return thirdPartyAmountValidation(event,this.id);" maxlength="8" aria-haspopup="true" role="textbox" ondragstart="return false" ondrop="return false">

<input autocomplete="new-password" type="password" name="AuthenticationFG.ACCESS_CODE" size="28" class="loginPanelTextboxMediumStyle virtual-keyboard ui-keyboard-input ui-widget-content ui-corner-all ui-keyboard-autoaccepted ui-keyboard-input-current" id="AuthenticationFG.ACCESS_CODE" onfocus="settingPinPadCtlOnFocus(this,2,'AuthenticationFG.ACCESS_CODE'),fixedDisplay(this.id);" maxlength="128" aria-haspopup="true" role="textbox" ondragstart="return false" ondrop="return false" tabindex="0">
